source: Federal Parliament Secretariat, Singha Durbar, Kathmandu; cross-referenced with hr.parliament.gov.np and na.parliament.gov.np
data_notes: Names and districts sourced from an authoritative CSV cross-reference (correct Unicode Devanagari), not the raw PDF text layer, which has a broken font ToUnicode CMap that silently corrupts certain consonants.
Phone numbers and email addresses were extracted from the PDF text layer (digits/Latin text are not affected by the font corruption) and cross-matched to each member by page position.
Photos sourced from the official hr.parliament.gov.np and na.parliament.gov.np member directories.
8 of 332 members have no phone number on file in the source directory (left null rather than guessed).
Rashtriya Sabha serial number 14 is genuinely absent from the source PDF (not a parsing error).
